data.title: Fed's Williams: The current moderately restrictive policy stance is completely appropriate, and no clear interest rate cut expectations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: New York Fed President Williams said that given the high uncertainty in monetary policy, the current moderately restrictive stance is "perfectly appropriate" against the backdrop of a solid job market and inflation slightly above the 2% target. He did not elaborate on his specific expectations for this year's policy path in his speech, but pointed out that the U.S. economic foundation was good in early 2025, and although the inflation cooling process was challenging, the job market itself was not a source of price pressure. He added that fiscal, trade policies and geopolitical developments still bring high uncertainty. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Financial Regulators Remove 'Reputation Risk' from Banking Standards
data.description: According to PANews, recent developments indicate that the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) in the United States has officially removed 'reputation risk' from its bank examination criteria. This change follows a commitment by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell last month to eliminate guidelines that instructed staff to monitor bank executives for controversial statements. The OCC's decision marks a shift towards focusing on more transparent risk areas in the future. This move addresses one of the key factors that previously contributed to 'debanking,' where regulatory bodies required banks to consider 'reputation risk' when assessing clients' eligibility for financial services.

data.title: Fed's Williams: Current Monetary Policy Stance Appropriate Amid Economic Uncertainty
data.description: According to Odaily, New York Federal Reserve President John Williams stated that the current moderately restrictive monetary policy is "entirely appropriate" given the robust job market and inflation slightly above the 2% target. While he did not specify expectations for this year's policy path, Williams noted that the U.S. economy is fundamentally strong at the beginning of 2025. He acknowledged the challenges in reducing inflation but emphasized that the labor market is not the source of price pressures. Williams also highlighted that fiscal, trade policies, and geopolitical developments continue to contribute to significant uncertainty.

data.description:
, along with most top coins, has taken a dip as investors brace for a "triple witching" dose of market volatility. At the time of publication, has shed 2.4% since yesterday, slipping below $84,000. The followed it, also dropping 2.4% to trade for $1,948.93, according to CoinGecko data. ETH hasn't been this low since November […]
source: https://decrypt.co/311081/bitcoin-solana-xrp-prices-witchy-volatility

data.title: AscendEX will list quq (QUQ)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch quq (QUQ) at 22:00 on March 21, opening the QUQ/USDT trading pair, and is now open for recharge.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%. Trade Memecoin on AscendEX.

data.title: Trump's executive director says there are "countless options" to buy Bitcoin and will implement the "best option"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In an interview, the executive director of US President Trump said that "there are already countless plans" for the country to buy Bitcoin, and said "we will implement the best plan." This statement may imply that the Trump administration will continue to promote the Bitcoin reserve strategy in the future.

data.title: LBank has launched AFT U-margined Perpetual Contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the AFT U-based perpetual contract at 20:10 (SGT) on March 21, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 20 times.

data.title: Strategy upsizes STRF perpetual preferred stock offering to $722.5 million to buy more bitcoin
data.description:
Strategy announced the pricing of its STRF offering on Friday, upsizing the deal from $500 million to $722.5 million to buy more bitcoin.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347498/strategy-bitcoin-strf?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SEC Crypto Asset Task Force to hold first roundtable meeting at 1 a.m. to discuss key regulatory issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The SEC Crypto Asset Task Force will hold its first roundtable meeting at 1 a.m. Beijing time today to discuss key areas of crypto asset regulation, including market structure, investor protection, token classification, and compliance paths. This meeting marks a new step for the SEC in crypto regulation, aiming to promote policy transparency and listen to industry opinions. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: SEC Cryptocurrency Task Force to Hold First Roundtable on Regulatory Concerns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's cryptocurrency task force is set to convene its inaugural roundtable meeting today at 1 p.m. Eastern Time. The discussion will focus on key areas of concern in the regulation of crypto assets.
